name: openlidarviewer
description: Open any 3D scan — drone LiDAR, terrestrial laser scan, or phone scan — instantly and privately, in a browser tab. No install, no upload, no conversion.
author: A. Urias

scripts.build:live: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; s=$(date +%s); tsc --noEmit && vite build --mode live; c=$?; e=$(( $(date +%s) - s )); echo "[build:live] elapsed=${e}s exit=${c}"; if [ $c -eq 0 ] && [ $e -gt 120 ]; then echo "[build:live] WARNING: took ${e}s. A healthy live build is well under a minute; " "the obfuscator transform is the usual cause. Re-run and compare before trusting a timing-sensitive result." >&2; fi; exit $c'
scripts.test:build: npm run build && BUILD_CONTRACT=1 vitest run tests/chunkIsolation.test.ts tests/orbitSmoke.test.ts
scripts.repro: REPRO=1 vitest run tests/reproPack.test.ts && python3 benchmarks/plots.py
scripts.test:release: npm run test:release:execute && npm run lint:evidence
scripts.docs:dev: npm run docs:render && vitepress dev docs-site
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:render && vitepress build docs-site && node scripts/lint-docs-site.mjs
scripts.evidence: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; mkdir -p release; npm run test:release:execute > release/gate.log 2>&1; code=$?; node scripts/collect-evidence.mjs release/gate.log "$code" && npm run lint:evidence'
scripts.test:release:execute: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:no-ignored-src && npm run lint:release-sync && npm run lint:main-deferral && npm run lint:inline-imports && npm run lint:unsafe-html && npm run lint:layer-boundaries && npm run lint:position-access && npm run lint:monolith-size && npm run lint:claim-register && npm run check:deps && npm run test:build && npm run build:live && npm run check:bundle && npm run test:buckets:verify && npm run test:unit && npm run test:export && npm run test:terrain && npm run test:ui && npm run test:slow && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:smoke:live && npm run test:smoke:mobile
scripts.test:release:tag: npm run test:release && npm run test:e2e
